headline: Alliant Energy Corporation Declares Quarterly Common Stock Dividend
summary: MADISON, Wis., July 17, 2026--The Alliant Energy Corporation (NASDAQ: LNT) Board of Directors yesterday declared a quarterly cash dividend of $0.5350 per share payable on August 17, 2026, to shareowners of record as of the close of business on July 31, 2026.
